rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM BENTON et al VS. STEVEN CASSORLA et al
rulings.Rulings: (LATE TENTATIVE) DENY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE WHETHER ONE OR THREE UNITS. GRANT MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION RE WARRANTY OF HABITABILITY, NOT AN AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE. GRANT MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION RE FAILURE TO STATE A CLAIM, NO DEFECT CITED. GRANT MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION RE DOMINANT MOTIVE. BURDEN SHIFTS ON LANDLORDS' DECLARATIONS OF MOTIVE. NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT. (PHA/CW)
